headline: Helen of Troy Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Sales down 3.3% Y/Y
summary: HELE tops fourth-quarter estimates, but sales fall 3.3% Y/Y as Beauty & Wellness weakness and margin pressures weigh on performance.

raw.headline: Helen of Troy Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Sales down 3.3% Y/Y

headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks with Open Questions
summary: While strong cash flow is a key indicator of stability, it doesn’t always translate to superior returns. Some cash-heavy businesses struggle with inefficient spending, slowing demand, or weak competitive positioning.
